app_release_notes: v1.2.8 - The Measure Target screen is cleaner: when your ladder is already planned, the charge fields you set in New Ladder no longer repeat, and Undo/Clear/Start-this-target-over sit next to Save. Your point-of-aim offset now reads in your scope's dial unit (mils or MOA) so you can use it to sight in. Fixed a wrong default bullet (it stays blank until you pick one). Saved target photos group into collapsible folders by load. Plus a bigger "Set this scale" button and visible Barrels +/- buttons.

mac.app_release_notes: v1.2.8 - The Measure Target screen is cleaner: when your ladder is already planned, the charge fields you set in New Ladder no longer repeat, and Undo/Clear/Start-this-target-over sit next to Save. Your point-of-aim offset now reads in your scope's dial unit (mils or MOA) so you can use it to sight in. Fixed a wrong default bullet (it stays blank until you pick one). Saved target photos group into collapsible folders by load. Plus a bigger "Set this scale" button and visible Barrels +/- buttons.

windows.app_release_notes: v1.2.6 - Compare Loads now shows every load you've saved across all your workbooks (grouped by rifle), and the Load Card prints the correct group, mean radius, and vertical SD for a powder-charge winner. Includes the 1.2.4/1.2.5 import fixes: Garmin xlsx import, target groups auto-pair by shot order, and cleaner staged-file handling.
